title: The Establishment of the Dinh Dynasty
summary: In 968, Dinh Bo Linh ascended the throne, named the country Dai Co Viet, and reaffirmed our country as an independent nation.

slides.text: After defeating the 12 warlords, Dinh Bo Linh officially ascended the throne and became Emperor, taking the title Dinh Tien Hoang. This was a monumental event!
slides.imagePrompt: Imperial ceremony at Hoa Lu citadel, golden banners, King Dinh sitting on the throne, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He chose Hoa Lu as the capital. This place is surrounded by towering limestone mountains that serve as natural fortress walls to protect the King.
slides.imagePrompt: Landscape of Hoa Lu ancient capital, limestone mountains, peaceful river, ancient palace roofs peeking through, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: King Dinh also ordered the minting of copper coins to make it easier for people to buy and sell. These were the first coins in our country's history!
slides.imagePrompt: Close-up of ancient round coins with a square hole in the middle, shine of copper, happy market scene, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: With the country unified, people's lives became stable and prosperous. Everyone was grateful to the gifted 'King of Ten Thousand Victories'.
slides.imagePrompt: Vietnamese farmers celebrating a harvest, smiling faces, sun shining, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Which place did Dinh Bo Linh choose as the capital?
What did Dinh Bo Linh do to help the economy develop?
